evidence: CSS academy-native-lesson.css:76-78 global [data-readout]{font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums}. Browser test 'instrument typography' asserts tabular-nums on all >=8 readouts, passed Chromium (test:academy 59/59) and WebKit (test:webkit 41/41). Own Playwright computed-style probe over mission/lab/influence: 13 visible [data-readout] per surface, 0 missing tabular-nums, 0 non-mono.

Browser test cycles digits 0-9 (four repeated) through #backspinTruth measuring getBoundingClientRect().width; asserts max-min < 0.6px. Passed both engines. Backed by tabular-nums + IBM Plex Mono confirmed in probe.

academy-readout-format.js MINUS='−'; unit test 'readout formatter owns U+2212 (EV-TYPO-03)' passed. Browser typography test asserts doesNotMatch /-\d/ on every readout text (hyphen never used), and aria-valuetext doesNotMatch U+2212. Passed both engines.

ux test 'instrument typography tokens': literalFamilies (non-var, non-inherit) in academy-native-lesson.css == [] ; sa-p3.css has exactly one --font-ui (line 93) and one --font-mono (line 95). Grep confirms all lesson-CSS font-family use var(--font-*). Passed.

Fresh npm run test:perf regenerated artifacts: chromium p95=3.2ms, webkit p95=7.0ms, events=220 each, budget 16.7ms; both tests passed. Harness dispatches real pointermove+input then forces offsetHeight style/layout flush after synchronous solve+DOM+canvas paint, >=200 events, both engines.

Ghost opacity applied only via context.globalAlpha inside drawTrajectory (canvas), academy-native-lesson.js:763-767; no decay/animation on DOM numbers. Browser test 'phosphor ghosts' asserts every [data-readout] computed animationName/transition == none/none; own probe confirms 0 render/animation on numbers. Passed both engines.

academy-trace-state.js MAX_GHOSTS=2, GHOST_OPACITIES=[0.4,0.16] (monotonic falling, [1]>0). Unit test EV-MOT-03 passed (third settle evicts oldest -> length 2, plan[0].opacity>plan[1].opacity). Browser test confirms data-ghost-count='2' normal-motion, '1' reduced-motion, both engines.

Browser test 'aperture signature transition': normal motion sets data-last-transition='aperture' with overlay aria-hidden=true and pointer-events:none (auto-hides); reduced motion sets 'fade' while truth stays live (#influenceBars rows>0). Passed Chromium and WebKit.

ux CSS grep: no box-shadow/text-shadow/-gradient(/backdrop-filter/filter: in academy-native-lesson.css and no createLinearGradient/createRadialGradient/shadowBlur/shadowColor/context.filter in renderer. Browser computed-style audit walks all six surfaces asserting 0 gradient/shadow/filter/backdrop offenders, passed both engines. Own probe: 0 offenders across all elements on mission/lab/influence.

Browser test 'trace annotation right' asserts exactly one visible [data-trace-annotation] (count===1) at initial state and re-asserts count===1 across a dynamicLoft state sweep (30->10->40). Passed both engines.

Own probe: annotation value color = rgb(255,138,77)=--accent (ember), truth #backspinTruth = ember; annotation structure/label = rgb(157,139,255)=--secondary (violet); real-world estimate band+echo values = violet rgb(157,139,255), never ember. Motor-truth never violet, estimate layer never ember. Browser test asserts same, both engines.

Browser test EV-NAT-01 sets documentElement font-size 130%, verifies rem-scaling ratio>1.25 on 3 probes, then walks all six surfaces asserting scrollLeft=0, doc horizontal overflow<=1px, no element clips past viewport width, scaled content scrolls not clips. Passed both engines.

Browser test EV-NAT-02 injects node_modules/axe-core/axe.min.js, runs axe on document (incl color-contrast) at each of the six surfaces, filters critical+serious -> asserts []. Passed Chromium and WebKit.

Browser test EV-NAT-03: #labRange aria-valuetext = 'minus 3 degrees' and '120 miles per hour' (sign+unit in words). 10 rapid input events yield <=3 #live region updates (debounced ~120ms, never per-event). Passed both engines.

config/flightglass-surfaces.json academy-lesson.requiredSelectors = [#nativeLesson,#missionStageBuild(Mission),#backspinTruth+#labRange(Lab),#masteryTask(Mastery),#nativeLessonResult(Result)]. ux test 'Backspin reference lesson targets 96' asserts this exact array. Passed.

npm run test:visreg passed: baselineInventory == 48 expected shots (2 engines x 2 viewports x 2 motion x 6 surfaces); current render diffs <= DIFF_THRESHOLD_PCT 0.1% against every approved baseline (per-channel tolerance 3, size-matched). Both engines, both motion modes.

npm run test:webkit = 41 tests, 41 pass, 0 fail on WebKit engine, covering viewport fit (430x932/375x812, doc no h-scroll), 44px target sizes, keyboard-only progression + roving/focus-visible, and failure-paths (storage throws, non-finite lab/mastery input, missing JPG, canvas context unavailable, route-change cancels settle).
